---
layout: default
title: "PM Modi’s Indonesia Visit and Domestic Political Developments"
date: 2026-07-08T06:10:30.135061+00:00
summary: "PM Modi addresses the Indonesian Parliament while domestic political tensions rise over electoral rolls, legislative failures, and upcoming state polls"
run_time_ist: "11:40AM"
---

<article class="digest-post">
  <a class="back-link" href="{{ '/' | relative_url }}">Political Brief</a>
  <p class="post-meta">Gemini Summary: 11:40AM</p>


<h2 class="section-title">India National Politics</h2>

<ul class="digest-points">
  <li><strong>PM Modi’s Indonesia address:</strong> Prime Minister Modi became the first Indian leader to address the Indonesian Parliament, where he advocated for UNSC reforms, emphasized non-expansionist development, and notably acknowledged Jawaharlal Nehru’s historical role.<span class="source-chips"><a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMitAFBVV95cUxPa3JGVEVEY0RJY2R3ZXFJQW1HU2k1eWtDYTdCUkt0ZGY1S0llUm9HSERzTVZsVTNnNm8yMnNoX0JxSjVDN3NCYmtOb3FjQ2FXQWw2MTdIaUl2dmh2THVNTm9Lc3lnNjREQThLNEMyUzhlR3E3NnVJRUtVLVFBeng3clp2OTVPUE9iR0RlSVVIUjVlMnl2U2NlVk1OdW0tVHh6S0VnWFFlYnZybVYzcTh6SGZ6cVY?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I3</a> <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I4</a> <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMitwFBVV95cUxPNG9nU2VsbzQxYzdkb2hBMXpWalRzQUlBVktZZ0hRR3JJbTBHWjVKei05VlpOOTg3RzRXTW12NjhKTHJNQ0h0V25rX3NnSzJkLXk3OUNKU0xpUWM1bGxudUFUa0VlY1lnSVlONEQ1cHpBTnh6ck04a3FGY3RNU0M1MXM5d3JCN1hnMG4yc1FKYmRMUTJuNVVDWU45ZldYcmkwa0psYlZCWFRpV1JFeGNaOTJVMllPR2c?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I5</a> <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiugFBVV95cUxOcU5YNEVQWjlUYmNobXBVZF9jd1B3aEh3ZUFlX1QzZE1hVmQ1ZVlmTGZIXzlHNllsZUVvdUJ3czlqRHNYdEtNRW50ckdVQmw1NGxrNm4tbl9CQ2stZVRIZFdYcjVKaHVfX2JYNXowWjFQaVdJaGtzVGI3bW1YS1BEX3lDejZVNFFpX3ZYV0h2OUFWMk1pOHNIUTVJdmxBZmFyVi13UHYxVWstTXVFNm41Nm1UZ1pSM0RKYmc?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I6</a> <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I7</a> <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMipAFBVV95cUxPRmYzbEg0ejBQLWlrR0NTVXpGamRaTXZYQVVEUXNnNTdOY09FUFY1WTItYXI5VzZEbHdtSWVoT1FqMlhZQ3p0NWxHQ2FmbGJ1VnM2M3E5ZEwybVVoSXdPcDY2QkIxRmRwMGRtQ2EwVU03SHNYWFlxdzZqX2UxdjZ6X2pJZUtQbVd3cmhHYVpSZUxyS0ZwVmswU25TT1U2RWY1R3Z4bQ?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I8</a> <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I9</a> <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I10</a> <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I11</a></span></li>
  <li><strong>Karnataka electoral dispute:</strong> The NDA has formally approached the Election Commission to demand a halt to the ongoing revision of electoral rolls in Karnataka, citing alleged irregularities.<span class="source-chips"><a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I1</a> <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I2</a></span></li>
  <li><strong>Legislative and judicial updates:</strong> A Constitutional Amendment Bill for women’s reservation failed in the Lok Sabha, while the Supreme Court declined to intervene in Kerala’s academic mark standardization policy.<span class="source-chips"><a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I13</a> <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiqwFBVV95cUxPSTVKRHVGUXlhNjVqNEczYkNpd1NvbmRYOU5Fd2RIZjV3OHBob0owSzh3LVRXdUVqSDNVZTgtbVZlUG8ybS1wallfSVdTeTRtNENIU0lwV3piczdxV2NEVmE0WC1GSTQyMjR4dkNPb1pqblB2SzNHQjZBRWVXZHpPZXE2bVlQc3NGNEFJVU1NUHJMMFFqSkdRUVFFMGZNRUkzSTc0LXphM1JaLXM?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I14</a></span></li>
</ul>

<h2 class="section-title">Policy and Institutions</h2>

<ul class="digest-points">
  <li><strong>Bengal Rajya Sabha polls:</strong> The BJP is poised for a clean sweep in the upcoming West Bengal Rajya Sabha elections following a decision by TMC factions to abstain from the contest.<span class="source-chips"><a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMi_?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">W10</a></span></li>
  <li><strong>Ram Mandir probe demand:</strong> Congress MP KC Venugopal has petitioned for a Supreme Court-monitored investigation into alleged embezzlement of donations intended for the Ram Mandir.<span class="source-chips"><a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMisgFBVV95cUxQTTJxRG1QQzdQR3VlZE1GTnJSX1dtYzl0eEoxdUVEU2h4bDhXSmZLRXVYelhRRHY4amQtb3JndFczcF9iZXlyME1sOHU5VGZFcjJTMG5NX1k5NUl6eUc0eXZxWDB4X0tnZXBFNGJfSDlYamFYUTZrOUI3OWxXMWNsY1M2NWZNRXI4UWlLbU53V3k4Ymx6eWVyNjA2NGxRR3F5dGVjbFlYWnBZTUNEd0plTDFn?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">W9</a></span></li>
</ul>

  <li><a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">[W13] Senior NCP (SP) leader Jayant Patil meets BJP leader Vinod Tawde amid &#x27;proposal&#x27; hint: What&#x27;s happening i - The Times of India</a> The Times of India</li>

  <li><a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">[W15] Fadnavis Rules Out Entry Of Any New Party Into NDA, Mahayuti In Maharashtra: &#x27;Our Doors Are Not Open&#x27; - News18</a> News18</li>
</ul>

</details>
</article>
